session_context: June 22 session overlay: neutral | stable; gap unresolved; low confidence, fragile stability.

drafts.x:
Oil is cratering — and the other signals aren't confirming.
Only matters if equities or yields confirms — and it hasn't yet.

SPX 7,521. 10Y 4.49%. Oil $74.

Invalidation:
• SPX breaks above 7,634 or below 7,409
• 10Y moves beyond 4.69% or below 4.29%

What breaks this range — and which direction?
drafts.substack:
REGIME: Neutral | Softening
CONFIDENCE: Low (35/100)
RISK TILT: neutral
STABILITY: Fragile

Snapshot — Jun 22, 2026
  S&P 500:     7,521.36   z +0.97
  10Y Yield:      4.493%  z +0.79
  WTI Oil:        73.92   z -2.49

INSIGHT
S&P 500 at 7,521 is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from equities. 10Y yield at 4.49% is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from yields. Oil at $74 is running well below its 63-session range — oil haven't been this stretched in months. Confidence is low at 35/100 — the read is fragile and needs more signal before acting on it.

INVALIDATION
• SPX breaks above 7,634 or below 7,409
• 10Y moves beyond 4.69% or below 4.29%

Method: MacroEvidence pipeline · yfinance + FRED · 63-session rolling z-scores · not financial advice.

regime_analogs.intro: As of June 22, 2026, three closest structural matches for today’s neutral stable regime — gap unresolved at 0.18σ, WTI at Z -2.49 non-confirming. Members search the full 50-year database.

analog_rows.outcome: Regime held neutral for 5 sessions before resolving pro-risk — SPX cleared the confirmation gate as 10Y stayed range-bound and oil’s extreme low did not drive the shift

analog_rows.gap: Gap 0.00σ · fully unresolved · WTI extreme low
analog_rows.outcome: Regime broke defensive — SPX lost the lower threshold within 3 sessions as 10Y held flat and oil’s deflationary signal eventually spread to equities
Regime stayed fragile for 7 sessions, then resolved pro-risk as SPX ground above the gate while 10Y remained anchored near the mean

regime_analogs.context_note: Structural pattern matches only — not predictions. Gap at 0.18σ with WTI at Z -2.49 (non-confirming outlier) is the defining condition. Resolution at 7,634 and 4.69%. Historical context.
